title: The AI Cold War, Signalgate, CoreWeave IPO, Tariff Endgames, El Salvador Deportations
description:
(0:00) The Besties welcome Gavin Baker back on the show!

(1:20) Nvidia balance sheet questions, CoreWeave IPO, M&A/IPO bounce back

(16:22) US vs China in AI: Manus, China building its own Nvidia, and more

(28:37) The Administration's endgame for tariffs

(53:05) Signalgate: context and fallout

(1:09:42) El Salvador deportations

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses various topics including the AI Cold War, Signalgate, CoreWeave IPO, tariff endgames, and El Salvador deportations with guest Gavin Baker. The episode covers the US vs China in AI, Nvidia balance sheet questions, and the Administration's endgame for tariffs. The hosts also delve into the context and fallout of Signalgate and the situation in El Salvador. The conversation is marked by a mix of optimism and caution as the hosts navigate the complexities of the current geopolitical and technological landscape.

takeaways.text: US and China are in an AI Cold War
Signalgate has significant context and fallout
El Salvador deportations are a growing concern
China is building its own Nvidia

sentiment.notes: The hosts express a mix of optimism and caution as they discuss the complexities of the current geopolitical and technological landscape. They acknowledge the challenges and uncertainties of the AI Cold War, tariff endgames, and Signalgate, but also highlight potential opportunities and areas for growth.

notable_moments.description: Discussion of US vs China in AI begins
Signalgate context and fallout are discussed
